name: Navy Bean Soup (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar or veggie stock
1 cup Celery leaves and tender stalks, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick over the beans. Cover with water and soak overnight or use a quick soak method.
2. Discard the soaking water, rinse the beans, and place them in a large soup pot.
3. Add 8 cups of water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a low simmer and cover tightly.
4. Add sliced carrots.
5. In a nonstick pan, sauté onions in balsamic vinegar (or red wine vinegar) until they caramelize over low heat (this can take some time).
6. Add minced garlic, celery leaves, and bell pepper. Continue sautéing, adding more liquid if necessary.
7. When the mixture has cooked down somewhat, add it to the beans in the soup pot.
8. Add the remaining ingredients except for the miso.
9. Simmer very slowly for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
10. Stir in the barley miso and simmer an additional 1 to 2 hours until the beans are tender as desired.
11. Remove bay leaves and serve with hard bread and salad.
